particulars.description: The freehold properties known as:. (1) 16 florence park road, oxford OX4 3PH. (2) 18 florence park road, oxford OX4 3PH. (3) 20 florence park road, oxford OX4 3PH. Title numbers:. (1) ON92725. (2) ON27891. (3) ON13455.

16 florence park road, oxford, OX4 3PH as the same is registered at the land registry under title number ON92725; 18 florence park road, oxford, OX4 3PH as the same is registered at the land registry under title number ON27891; 20 florence park road, oxford, OX4 3PH as the same is registered at the land registry under title number ON13455; 18A florence park road, oxford OX4 3PH as the same is registered at the land registry under title number ON44327; ground floor flat, 18 florence park road, oxford OX4 3PH as the same is registered at the land registry under title number ON37871; and 20A florence park road, cowley, oxford OX4 3PH as the same is registered at the land registry under title number ON342383.
